latest.title: Bangladesh rivers carve the land in fast motion
latest.script_key: watch this river in bangladesh those twisting loops they re not decoration the water cuts into the outside bank and drops sediment on the inside that s why the curve moves sideways like this i can see the land shifting right now would you trust a river to stay still

latest.title: beach waves hide a light trick
latest.script_key: waves aren t just blue they flash white because bubbles trap air and bend light that s why sunsets over water look extra sparkly next time you re at the shore watch the foam stretch like liquid glass did you notice this before

latest.title: Forests make cooler air under the canopy
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next

latest.title: Autumn rivers hide a moving shortcut
latest.script_key: watch the bend in the middle that s where the water cuts straight through the bank underwater you don t see it from the sky because the shortcut tunnels under the curve that s why the river shortens itself every year ever wondered how land disappears like that can you spot the bend that s about to change next

latest.title: Sheep stand still for a surprising reason
latest.script_key: sheep freeze like statues because their eyes are on the sides not the front that s why they can see almost all the way around watch how they turn their heads instead of bolting would you trust a predator not to notice if you barely moved

latest.title: Sheep milk lets lambs grow faster than you think

latest.title: Mangroves take power out of waves
latest.script_key: mangroves can slow waves before they hit land watch the roots in the water because mangroves create a rough barrier that breaks up wave energy they also shelter young fish and hold muddy coastlines together restoration can be infrastructure made of roots which repair story next
